title: CoordsPlugin
description: A minecraft plugin that allows players to retrieve the coordinates of another player in  game.
body:
CoordsPlugin is a Spigot plugin for  Minecraft that allows players to retrieve the coordinates of another player in the game.
- Retrieve the X, Y, and Z coordinates of a specified player.
- Simple and easy-to-use command: `/coords <playername>`.
- Only available for in-game players.
